title: Rose Gold Wrapping Paper Roll 43cm x 10m, Solid Color Metallic Matte Gift Wrap Paper for Girls Women, Rose Gold Gift Wrapping Paper for Wedding Birthday Christmas Baby Shower Graduation Anniversary
features: Rose Gold Wrapping Paper Roll: Gift wrapping paper roll measures 43CM x 10M, suitable for most small to large gifts, you can also cut it into different sizes easily, long enough for your wrapping project.

Premium Quality: Gift wrapping paper is made of high quality thick paper with a nice matte shine finish, which is easy to cut and fold, smooth surface, sturdy and durable, easy to wrap and not easy to tear.

Gorgeous Shimmery Rose Gold Color: Wrapping paper designed with a pretty matte rose gold color, rose gold wrapping paper with a soft sheen, elegant and classy, perfect for gift wrapping, easy to decorate with ribbons, tags or jute twine.

All Occasion: Ideal beautiful gift wrapping paper for Birthdays, Wedding, Bridal, Baby Shower, Christmas, Holidays, Graduation, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Father's Day, any occasions. Classy birthday wrapping paper for both girls and boys, women and men
Multiple Uses: Shiny solid color paper can also be used for flower wrapping, home decor, party decoration, book wrapping paper and any other DIY project.
